addition.note: Chapters 4: sums ≤10. Chapters 7: sums 11-20. Chapter 15: sums up to 100.

subtraction.note: Chapter 5: minuend ≤10. Chapter 8: minuend 11-20. Chapter 16: up to 100.

chapter_rules.title: Comparison
chapter_rules.logic: larger/smaller/more/less — uses everyday objects like plants, jars, baskets
chapter_rules.visual_hint: taller/shorter objects side by side; more/fewer groups of objects

chapter_rules.title: Counting
chapter_rules.logic: counting physical objects; matching one-to-one; recognising quantity without counting
chapter_rules.visual_hint: fish, flowers, birds, mangoes appearing one by one

chapter_rules.title: Numbers (1 to 10)
chapter_rules.input_pattern: number recognition 1-10, what number, write the number, number name
chapter_rules.logic: digit recognition and writing for numbers 1–10
chapter_rules.visual_hint: objects matching each digit (3 fish = 3); number written beside objects

chapter_rules.title: Concept of Addition
chapter_rules.input_pattern: a + b where a+b ≤ 10, together/total/combine (1-10 range)
chapter_rules.logic: concept-first: show two groups, bring together, count total; max sum = 10
chapter_rules.visual_hint: fish in a pond: show group A, then group B arriving, total counted aloud

chapter_rules.title: Concept of Subtraction
chapter_rules.input_pattern: a - b where a ≤ 10, take away/flew away/left (1-10 range)
chapter_rules.logic: concept-first: show starting group, remove some, count what remains; no negative results
chapter_rules.visual_hint: mangoes in a basket: some taken away, rest counted

chapter_rules.title: Numbers (11 to 20)
chapter_rules.input_pattern: 1 bundle and N ones = ?, numbers 11-20, bundles and singles in 11-20
chapter_rules.logic: 1 bundle (ten-stick) + singles = number; e.g. 1 bundle + 3 ones = 13
chapter_rules.visual_hint: bundle of 10 sticks + loose sticks; abacus; ten-frame

chapter_rules.title: Addition (11 to 20)
chapter_rules.logic: addition with sums in 11–20 range, building on tens
chapter_rules.visual_hint: number line jumps, ten-frame with extra counters

chapter_rules.title: Subtraction (11 to 20)
chapter_rules.visual_hint: ten-frame removing counters; jumping back on number line

chapter_rules.title: Numbers (21 to 40)
chapter_rules.input_pattern: bundles and singles in 21-40 range, 2 bundles and N ones
chapter_rules.logic: 2 bundles (tens) + singles = number; extends place value to 40
chapter_rules.visual_hint: two bundles of 10 sticks + loose sticks

chapter_rules.title: Place Value
chapter_rules.input_pattern: tens and ones in n, how many tens in N, how many ones in N
chapter_rules.logic: tens = n // 10, ones = n % 10; abacus and base-10 block representation
chapter_rules.visual_hint: bundles of sticks (দশ মিলিয়ে এক বান্ডিল), abacus beads sliding into columns

chapter_rules.title: Let us do (practice 1–40)
chapter_rules.input_pattern: mixed practice with numbers 1–40, addition and subtraction within 40
chapter_rules.logic: application of chapters 1–10; mixed question types

chapter_rules.title: Geometry
chapter_rules.input_pattern: shape name, how many sides, corners, shape recognition
chapter_rules.logic: circle (0 sides), triangle (3 sides/corners), rectangle (4 sides), square (4 equal sides)
chapter_rules.visual_hint: shapes drawn with properties labelled: sides, corners

chapter_rules.title: Pattern
chapter_rules.input_pattern: repeating sequence, what comes next, complete the pattern
chapter_rules.logic: shape, colour, or number repeating pattern; identify the repeating unit
chapter_rules.visual_hint: repeating SVG shapes in a sequence, next item highlighted

chapter_rules.title: Numbers (41 to 100)
chapter_rules.input_pattern: bundles and singles in 41-100 range, numbers 41-100
chapter_rules.logic: extends number recognition to 100; bundles system generalised
chapter_rules.visual_hint: multiple bundles + singles; place value chart tens/ones

chapter_rules.title: Addition (up to 100)
chapter_rules.input_pattern: a + b where sum ≤ 100, column addition
chapter_rules.logic: columnar addition: ones first, then tens; may involve carrying (সংরক্ষণ)
chapter_rules.visual_hint: column arithmetic: digits stacked, ones added first

chapter_rules.title: Subtraction (up to 100)
chapter_rules.input_pattern: a - b where a ≤ 100, column subtraction
chapter_rules.logic: columnar subtraction: ones first, then tens; may involve borrowing (ধার)
chapter_rules.visual_hint: column arithmetic: digits stacked, ones subtracted first

chapter_rules.title: Bangladeshi Currency
chapter_rules.input_pattern: taka and poisa, notes and coins, total money, price, change
chapter_rules.logic: recognise taka notes (2, 5, 10, 20, 50, 100) and poisa coins; add/subtract money amounts
chapter_rules.visual_hint: taka notes fanning out; coins stacked; water lily on 1 taka coin

chapter_rules.title: Let us do (final practice)
chapter_rules.input_pattern: mixed practice all chapters, word problems, real-life scenarios
chapter_rules.logic: application of all Class 1 topics; Bangladeshi real-life contexts

subtraction: fish swimming away from a pond
place_value: bundles of 10 sticks (দশ মিলিয়ে এক বান্ডিল)
patterns: colours of flowers in a row

messages.out_of_scope_topic: This is outside NCTB Class 1 right now. Let's try a Class 1 topic.
messages.fraction_out_of_scope: Fractions are not in NCTB Class 1. Let's use whole numbers.
messages.negative_subtraction: We cannot take {b} away from {a}. In Class 1 we always subtract the smaller number from the bigger one.
messages.max_number_exceeded: This is advanced for Class 1. Please use numbers up to {max_number}.
messages.multiplication_out_of_scope: Multiplication is not in NCTB Class 1. Let's try addition instead.
messages.division_out_of_scope: Division is not in NCTB Class 1. Let's try subtraction instead.
messages.counting_range: For this counting task, please stay between {min_value} and {max_value}.
